# TOC File Format

`CONTEXT_TOC.md` is fully generated by `build_toc.sh`. This page documents its
structure so you know what to expect when reading it.

## Structure

```markdown
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by build_toc.sh — do not edit directly.
     Edit CONTEXT.yml and CONTEXT_INSTRUCTIONS.md instead. -->

# {title from CONTEXT.yml}

> {description from CONTEXT.yml}

## Instructions

{content of CONTEXT_INSTRUCTIONS.md}

## Always Load

*The following folders should be loaded whenever you read this TOC:*

- [FolderName/](FolderName/CONTEXT_TOC.md)

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
| ------ | ----------- |
| [SubfolderName/](SubfolderName/CONTEXT_TOC.md) | Description from subfolder CONTEXT.yml |
| [../sibling/CONTEXT/](../sibling/CONTEXT/CONTEXT_TOC.md) | Description from sibling |

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [document.md](document.md) | Description from document front matter |
```

## Sections

### Header comment

Always the first line. Identifies the file as auto-generated and points to the
source files to edit instead.

### Title and description

Taken directly from `CONTEXT.yml`. The description is rendered as a blockquote.
Both sections are omitted if empty.

### Instructions

Present only if `CONTEXT_INSTRUCTIONS.md` exists. The full content of that file
is included verbatim here. This is the section LLMs should read for task-specific
guidance.

### Always Load

Present only if `eager_read` has entries in `CONTEXT.yml`. Lists folders that
should be loaded as part of reading this TOC (i.e., without needing progressive
discovery). Informational — the LLM acts on this, not the script.

### Subfolders

A Markdown table of context nodes adjacent to or nested within this one:
- Column 1: link to the subfolder's own `CONTEXT_TOC.md`
- Column 2: the subfolder's `description` from its `CONTEXT.yml`
- Items marked *(read-only)* are externally managed (listed in `read_only` config)

An empty table is replaced with `_No context subfolders found._`

### Files

A Markdown table of `.md` context documents in this `CONTEXT/` directory:
- Column 1: link to the file
- Column 2: the file's `description` from its YAML front matter

An empty table is replaced with `_No context files found._`

## What's Excluded

The script never adds these to the Files table:

| Filename | Reason |
|----------|--------|
| `CONTEXT_TOC.md` | This file itself |
| `CONTEXT_INSTRUCTIONS.md` | Inlined into the Instructions section |
| `SYSTEM.md` | One-time system explanation; not a context document |
| Files matching `ignore` list | Explicitly excluded by config |
| Files starting with `_` | Excluded by `skip_underscore: true` (default) |
